# Deviation/Postmortem: [Occurrence]

## Problem
[What happened? (e.g., Code failure, Agent deviation, or abandoned branch)]

## Circumstances
[When/Where did it occur? What was the context before the problem?]

## Root Cause
[Why did we diverge? (e.g., Missing context, technical limitation, or logic flaw)]

## Remediation
[How do we prevent this in the next session? What changes to our docs or workflow are needed?]
